--- graph_table_as_alias.sql
SELECT t.v FROM GRAPH_TABLE (FinGraph LET x = 1 RETURN x AS v) AS t TABLESAMPLE BERNOULLI (10 PERCENT)

--- AST
&ast.QueryStatement{
  Query: &ast.Select{
    Results: []ast.SelectItem{
      &ast.ExprSelectItem{
        Expr: &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 7,
              NameEnd: 8,
              Name:    "t",
            },
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 9,
              NameEnd: 10,
              Name:    "v",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    From: &ast.From{
      From:   11,
      Source: &ast.GraphTableExpr{
        GraphTable: 16,
        RParen:     61,
        GraphName:  &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 29,
              NameEnd: 37,
              Name:    "FinGraph",
            },
          },
        },
        Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
          Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
            &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
              Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
                &ast.GQLLet{
                  Let:   38,
                  Items: []*ast.GQLLetItem{
                    &ast.GQLLetItem{
                      Ident: &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 42,
                        NameEnd: 43,
                        Name:    "x",
                      },
                      Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                        ValuePos: 46,
                        ValueEnd: 47,
                        Base:     10,
                        Value:    "1",
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLReturn{
                  Return: 48,
                  Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
                    &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                      Star: -1,
                      Expr: &ast.Ident{
                        NamePos: 55,
                        NameEnd: 56,
                        Name:    "x",
                      },
                      Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                        As:    57,
                        Alias: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 60,
                          NameEnd: 61,
                          Name:    "v",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
        As: &ast.AsAlias{
          As:    63,
          Alias: &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 66,
            NameEnd: 67,
            Name:    "t",
          },
        },
        Sample: &ast.TableSample{
          TableSample: 68,
          Method:      "BERNOULLI",
          Size:        &ast.TableSampleSize{
            Lparen: 90,
            Rparen: 101,
            Value:  &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 91,
              ValueEnd: 93,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "10",
            },
            Unit: "PERCENT",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SELECT t.v FROM GRAPH_TABLE(FinGraph LET x = 1 RETURN x AS v) AS t TABLESAMPLE BERNOULLI (10 PERCENT)
